era_context: Early Dynastic Period I in Mesopotamia; First Dynasty of Egypt. Writing is nascent. Urban civilization is emerging in river valleys. The world is predominantly non-literate.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Essentially all regions except Mesopotamia and Egypt
Most of Mesopotamia and Egypt outside major urban centers
disconfirming_evidence: No events are documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: This year is undocumented. No contemporary written sources exist. Archaeological evidence cannot be resolved to individual years with confidence. Chronological uncertainty is ±50–100 years or greater. This period marks the very threshold of written history; most of human civilization remains unrecorded.
